case_title: GEICO CASUALTY COMPANY VS. IMPARK PACIFIC PARKING, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100041349) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEICO CASUALTY COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-19-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUBROGATION/INSURANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEICO CASUALTY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT IMPARK PACIFIC PARKING, INC. DOES 1 THROUGH 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-20-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-24-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-28-2019

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-20-2019 CONTINUED TO JUN-19-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AFFIDAVIT OF PLAINTIFFS EMPLOYEE JACOB KLEINE (TRANSACTION ID # 100043093) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEICO CASUALTY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT IMPARK PACIFIC PARKING, INC.

REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $459.75 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100043093) AS TO DEFENDANT IMPARK PACIFIC PARKING, INC.
